source_doc.title: Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices - Traffic Control Devices

rules.name: Sign Height Rural Minimum
rules.description: Minimum sign height in rural areas
rules.error_message: Sign height below rural minimum (5 ft)

rules.name: Sign Height Urban Minimum
rules.description: Minimum sign height in urban/business areas
rules.error_message: Sign height below urban minimum (7 ft)

rules.name: Sign Height Physical Range
rules.description: Sign height must be physically plausible
rules.error_message: Sign height outside physical range

rules.name: Lateral Offset Minimum
rules.description: Minimum lateral clearance from roadway edge
rules.error_message: Sign lateral offset below minimum (2 ft)

rules.name: Lateral Offset Physical Range
rules.description: Lateral offset must be physically plausible
rules.error_message: Sign lateral offset outside physical range

rules.name: Sign Retroreflectivity Minimum White
rules.description: Minimum retroreflectivity for white sign elements
rules.error_message: Sign retroreflectivity below minimum

rules.name: Sign Tilt Maximum
rules.description: Sign should be near vertical
rules.error_message: Sign tilt exceeds acceptable range

rules.name: Sign Detection Confidence
rules.description: Minimum confidence for reliable sign detection
rules.error_message: Low sign detection confidence - manual review recommended

rules.name: Line Width Normal Minimum
rules.description: Minimum width for normal lane line markings
rules.error_message: Line width below minimum (4 in)

rules.name: Line Width Wide Maximum
rules.description: Maximum width for wide lane line markings
rules.error_message: Line width exceeds maximum (12 in)

rules.name: Broken Line Segment Standard
rules.description: Standard broken line segment is 10 ft
rules.error_message: Broken line segment length not standard (10 ft)

rules.name: Broken Line Gap Standard
rules.description: Standard broken line gap is 30 ft
rules.error_message: Broken line gap length not standard (30 ft)

rules.name: Marking Retroreflectivity Minimum White
rules.description: Minimum retroreflectivity for white markings
rules.error_message: Marking retroreflectivity below minimum - may need restriping

rules.name: Marking Retroreflectivity Minimum Yellow
rules.description: Minimum retroreflectivity for yellow markings
rules.error_message: Yellow marking retroreflectivity below minimum

rules.name: Marking Detection Confidence
rules.description: Minimum confidence for reliable marking detection
rules.error_message: Low marking detection confidence - manual review recommended

rules.name: Marking Visibility Minimum
rules.description: Minimum visibility score for adequate marking condition
rules.error_message: Low marking visibility - maintenance may be needed

rules.name: Signal Height Minimum
rules.description: Minimum signal head height over roadway
rules.error_message: Signal height below minimum (15 ft)

rules.name: Signal Height Maximum
rules.description: Maximum signal head height for visibility
rules.error_message: Signal height exceeds maximum (25 ft)

rules.name: Signal Height Physical Range
rules.description: Signal height must be physically plausible
rules.error_message: Signal height outside physical range

rules.name: Lens Diameter Standard
rules.description: Standard signal lens diameters are 8 or 12 inches
rules.error_message: Non-standard signal lens diameter

rules.name: Signal Sections Range
rules.description: Number of signal sections must be reasonable
rules.error_message: Invalid number of signal sections

rules.name: Signal Visibility Distance Minimum
rules.description: Minimum continuous visibility distance to signal
rules.error_message: Signal visibility distance below minimum (250 ft)

rules.name: Signal Detection Confidence
rules.description: Minimum confidence for reliable signal detection
rules.error_message: Low signal detection confidence - manual review recommended

rules.name: Signal Condition Minimum
rules.description: Minimum condition score for operational signal
rules.error_message: Poor signal condition - maintenance may be needed
